'''âch-zh-y-g''' ('''kachazhyegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubthump|tubthump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubthump|tubthump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-zh-y-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhyegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhyegoko|thichazhyegoko]] || [[word:jichazhyegoko|jichazhyegoko]] || [[word:shichazhyegoko|shichazhyegoko]] || [[word:kichazhyegoko|kichazhyegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhyegoko|thuthuchazhyegoko]] || [[word:jujuchazhyegoko|jujuchazhyegoko]] || [[word:shushuchazhyegoko|shushuchazhyegoko]] || [[word:kukuchazhyegoko|kukuchazhyegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhyegoko|thuchazhyegoko]] || [[word:juchazhyegoko|juchazhyegoko]] || [[word:shuchazhyegoko|shuchazhyegoko]] || [[word:kuchazhyegoko|kuchazhyegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhyegoko|thochazhyegoko]] || [[word:jochazhyegoko|jochazhyegoko]] || [[word:shochazhyegoko|shochazhyegoko]] || [[word:kochazhyegoko|kochazhyegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhyegoko|thochazhyegoko]] || [[word:jochazhyegoko|jochazhyegoko]] || [[word:shochazhyegoko|shochazhyegoko]] || [[word:kochazhyegoko|kochazhyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchazhyegoko|thĂŠchazhyegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠchazhyegoko|jĂŠchazhyegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠchazhyegoko|shĂŠchazhyegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠchazhyegoko|kĂŠchazhyegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhyegoko|thachazhyegoko]] || [[word:jachazhyegoko|jachazhyegoko]] || [[word:shachazhyegoko|shachazhyegoko]] || [[word:kachazhyegoko|kachazhyegoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachazhyegithi|shachazhyegithi]] || [[word:shachazhyegiji|shachazhyegiji]] || [[word:shachazhyegishi|shachazhyegishi]] || [[word:shachazhyegiki|shachazhyegiki]]
